description: Draws an open polyline connecting multiple points on a graph
utility: Creates line segments between consecutive points with optional styling and segment access via item()

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 2D graph to draw the polyline on

arguments.name: point1, point2, ...
arguments.description: At least 2 points (as point expressions or x,y coordinate pairs) to connect. Minimum 4 coordinate values (2 points)

alternates.description: Pass point expressions to define vertices

alternates.syntax: polyline(graph, x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3, ...)

examples.scenario: Three-point polyline using inline points with notes and stay

examples.expression:
P = polyline(G, A, B, C)
segment1 = item(P, 0)
hide(item(P, 1))
